home.hero.headline:
More than
hygiene.
home.hero.sub:
LUMO combines advanced technology with timeless design –
for a sense of well-being that begins every morning.
home.features.label: Designed for Health
home.features.title:
Technology you
feel – not see.
home.features.f1.title: Perfect cleansing – every time.
home.features.f1.desc: Adaptive cleansing technology adjusts automatically and delivers a flawless result – effortlessly.
home.features.f2.title: Your daily health ritual.
home.features.f2.desc: Integrated functions accompany your morning routine and support your well-being in a gentle, discreet way.
home.features.f3.title: Comfort that speaks for itself.
home.features.f3.desc: Heated seat, personalised temperature, whisper-quiet closing – LUMO learns your preferences.
home.features.f4.title: Less water. More responsibility.
home.features.f4.desc: Smart water consumption and antibacterial materials – sustainable from the very start.
home.preview.label: Collection
home.preview.title:
The right solution
for every requirement.
home.preview.p1.name: LUMO Home
home.preview.p1.desc: Compact floor-standing model with integrated cistern. Timeless design for premium private homes.
home.preview.p2.name: LUMO Pro
home.preview.p2.desc: Wall-hung, floating design. Maximum performance with health monitoring and app integration.
home.preview.p3.name: LUMO Pro Square
home.preview.p3.desc: Architectural purity. Geometric precision for design-forward bathrooms.
home.philosophy.label: Our Belief
home.philosophy.quote: "True hygiene begins with intelligence – and ends with a smile."
home.philosophy.text: LUMO stands for a new era of comfort. We believe the bathroom is not a functional space – it is the place where every day begins and ends. It deserves the very best.
home.cta.title:
Experience LUMO.
In person.
home.cta.sub: Book a personal consultation or visit one of our showrooms.
prod.hero.title:
Three models.
One standard.
prod.hero.sub: Floor-standing or wall-hung – LUMO is available in every form language your bathroom demands.
prod.py01.f2: Instant warm water – no waiting, no preheating.
prod.py01.f4: Soft night light guides you comfortably.
prod.py01.f5: Hands-free automatic open & close via sensor.
prod.ya61.f1: Floating wall design – easy to clean underneath.
prod.ya61.f4: Auto-open via microwave or foot sensor.
prod.ya61.f5: Personalised user profiles for the whole family.
prod.xa61.f1: Geometrically precise square form for architectural bathrooms.
prod.xa61.f2: Identical premium technology as LUMO Pro.
prod.xa61.f4: Heated seat (PP) or urea – your choice.
prod.xa61.f5: LED display available in glass, metal or IML.
prod.overview.label: Model overview
prod.overview.title:
All models
at a glance.
prod.comp.label: Comparison
prod.comp.title: Features in detail.
prod.app.title:
Your personal
health dashboard.
prod.app.desc: The LUMO App connects seamlessly with LUMO Pro – for discreet insights into your well-being routines.
cont.hero.title:
We are here for you.
Personally.
cont.hero.sub: Consultations, showroom appointments or questions about LUMO – our team looks forward to hearing from you.
cont.form.received: Your enquiry has been received. We will get back to you within 24 hours.
cont.form.name: Name
cont.form.privacy: Your data is treated in strict confidence. No spam, no sharing. See our privacy policy for details.
cont.info.hours.val3: Appointments outside these hours on request
cont.info.trade.desc: Special terms and showroom packages available. Contact us directly.
cont.show.title:
Experience LUMO –
near you.
exp.hero.title:
The future
begins in the bathroom.
exp.hero.sub: We believe that the most intimate space of daily life is the most important one. That is why we created LUMO.
exp.mission.text1: LUMO is more than a product. It is a conviction. The belief that daily hygiene is not a necessary burden – but a ritual that unites dignity, comfort and health.
exp.mission.text2: We combine decades of engineering expertise with the aesthetic sensibility that premium design deserves. The result: technology you feel – not see.
exp.values.label: What drives us
exp.values.title:
Five values.
One promise.
exp.values.v1.title: Hygiene & Health
exp.values.v1.desc: Perfect cleansing, every time. Because health starts in the details – and never stops.
exp.values.v2.title: Technology & Innovation
exp.values.v2.desc: We don't develop for today. We develop for what is yet to come.
exp.values.v3.title: Comfort & Design
exp.values.v3.desc: Beauty and function are not opposites – at LUMO, they are one.
exp.values.v4.title: Sustainability
exp.values.v4.desc: Lower resource consumption. Greater responsibility. For today and for tomorrow.
exp.values.v5.title: Discretion & Trust
exp.values.v5.desc: What stays in the bathroom, stays in the bathroom. Privacy is not an option for us – it is the standard.
exp.journey.label: Our journey
exp.journey.title: Milestones.
exp.journey.m1.title: The idea is born.
exp.journey.m1.desc: Two designers and an engineer ask: why is the bathroom the least thoughtfully designed room of all?
exp.journey.m2.title: First prototype lab.
exp.journey.m2.desc: After two years of development, the first functional LUMO prototype demonstrates what is possible.
exp.journey.m3.title: LUMO Home – market launch.
exp.journey.m3.desc: The first product line wins over premium homes, hotels and designer showrooms from day one.
exp.journey.m4.title: LUMO Pro & Care.
exp.journey.m4.desc: The family grows: extended health monitoring and a line tailored to special needs.
exp.journey.m5.title: Going international.
exp.journey.m5.desc: LUMO expands into ten European markets and opens flagship showrooms.
exp.targets.label: Who it's for
exp.targets.title:
Built for
the highest standards.
exp.targets.a1.label: Premium Private Homes
exp.targets.a1.desc: For people who appreciate the extraordinary in everyday life.
exp.targets.a2.label: Design & Tech Enthusiasts
exp.targets.a2.desc: Those who understand innovation choose LUMO.
exp.targets.a3.label: Hotels & Spas
exp.targets.a3.desc: Five-star comfort that delights and retains guests.
exp.targets.a4.label: Medical & Care Settings
exp.targets.a4.desc: LUMO Care supports where dignity and comfort matter most.
exp.cta.title:
Ready for a
new experience?
exp.cta.sub: Let us advise you personally and discover LUMO in one of our showrooms.
